title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 49.230 - Appeals
text:
49.230.  Appeals. — Appeals from the decisions, findings and orders of county commissions shall be conducted under the provisions of chapter 536.
(RSMo 1939 § 2490, A.L. 1959 S.B. 65, A.L. 1983 S.B. 219, A.L. 1985 S.B. 405) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2088; 1919 § 2584; 1909 § 4091 
(1984) When a county council makes a determination that would normally be made by a county commission in a noncharter county, the decisions of the county council come within the purview of this section governing appeals from decisions, findings and orders of county commissions of quasi-judicial nature. State ex rel. McNary v. Hais (Mo. banc), 670 S.W.2d 494.
